resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def hasAlternatingBits(self, n: int) -> bool:
        b = bin(n)[2]
        return all(b[i] != b[i-1] for i in range(1, len(b)))
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(log n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution converts the integer to a binary string and checks if each bit is different from the previous one using a generator expression.
